title: それは鎧、それは杖、それは蹄鉄

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I just received the notice that Camellia has
my dress ready for pickup. I thought to use this as
an opportunity to see their newest pieces.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you shop at Camellia. Cool, I have some
of their earrings.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? I like to shop high-end sometimes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't intend to come off judgmental! I just
thought you would comment on my upbringing...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What for? It's surprising to hear you care about
that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not bothered at all, really. It's simply
something I hear all the time—not out of malice,
of course.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Some people are like that, though... Dressed top
to bottom in designer items, only caring for the
labels.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I don't think you're one of those people. I
mean, you've got real backbone.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're true to yourself, you have confidence, and
you wear what makes you feel good. What else is
there to say?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well... Yes, I couldn't agree more!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My fashion reflects my values. Picking out
first-rate designs is what makes me King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, words to live by. Hope you find something
nice today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I wish the same to you!
